questions.transcript:
A. Passengers are cooking meals
B. Passengers are driving cars
C. Passengers are boarding a plane
D. Passengers are repairing luggage
questions.prompt: Select the statement that best describes the picture.
questions.explanationEn: Choice C is the statement that best matches the photo of people boarding a plane.
questions.explanationKo: C가 비행기에 탑승하는 장면을 가장 잘 묘사합니다.
questions.koreanLearnerHint: 탑승구 상황에서는 줄 서 있는 사람, 안내 표지, 탑승 동작을 먼저 확인하세요. 비행기 안 장면인지 공항 대기 공간인지 구분하는 것이 중요합니다.

vocabularyItems.exampleSentence: Passengers are boarding a plane.
The passengers are waiting near the aircraft.

vocabularyItem.exampleSentence: Passengers are boarding a plane.

questions.explanationJa: 正解は C です。この写真問題では、正しい文「Passengers are boarding a plane」が写真の中心動作・人物・物の状態を最も直接表しています。ほかの選択肢（Passengers are cooking meals / Passengers are driving cars）は、写真にない動作や物を含むため弱くなります。写真全体を訳そうとせず、まず主語、動作、場所の三点を音声と照合します。
questions.japaneseLearnerHint: 搭乗口の場面では、並んでいる人、案内表示、搭乗の動作を先に確認します。機内なのか空港の待合場所なのかを区別しましょう。

questions.transcript:
A. She is driving a bus
B. She is cooking dinner
C. She is reading a book
D. She is painting a house
questions.prompt: Select the statement that best describes the picture.
questions.explanationEn: Choice C is the statement that best describes the person reading a book.
questions.explanationKo: C가 책을 읽고 있는 사람을 가장 잘 묘사합니다.
questions.koreanLearnerHint: 사람이 책을 읽고 있는지, 글을 쓰고 있는지, 컴퓨터를 쓰는지 동작 동사를 먼저 예상하세요.

vocabularyItems.exampleSentence: She is reading a book.
The person is seated while reading.

vocabularyItem.exampleSentence: She is reading a book.

questions.explanationJa: 正解は C です。この写真問題では、正しい文「She is reading a book」が写真の中心動作・人物・物の状態を最も直接表しています。ほかの選択肢（She is driving a bus / She is cooking dinner）は、写真にない動作や物を含むため弱くなります。写真全体を訳そうとせず、まず主語、動作、場所の三点を音声と照合します。
questions.japaneseLearnerHint: 人物が本を読んでいるのか、書いているのか、コンピューターを使っているのか、動作動詞を先に予測します。

questions.transcript:
A. A customer is washing dishes
B. A waiter is serving food
C. A man is painting a wall
D. People are leaving the building
questions.prompt: Select the statement that best describes the picture.
questions.explanationEn: Choice B is the statement that best matches the food being served.
questions.explanationKo: B가 음식이 제공되는 장면을 가장 잘 묘사합니다.
questions.koreanLearnerHint: 음식이 제공되는 장면에서는 serve, plate, table 같은 단어를 중심으로 듣고, 사진에 없는 행동은 제외하세요.

vocabularyItems.exampleSentence: A server is serving food.
The food is placed on a plate.

vocabularyItem.exampleSentence: A server is serving food.

questions.explanationJa: 正解は B です。この写真問題では、正しい文「A waiter is serving food」が写真の中心動作・人物・物の状態を最も直接表しています。ほかの選択肢（A customer is washing dishes / A waiter is serving food）は、写真にない動作や物を含むため弱くなります。写真全体を訳そうとせず、まず主語、動作、場所の三点を音声と照合します。
questions.japaneseLearnerHint: 食べ物が出ている場面では serve, plate, table などを中心に聞きます。写真にない動作が出た選択肢は外します。

questions.transcript:
A. The people are cooking food
B. The people are running outside
C. The people are sitting around a table
D. The people are cleaning the room
questions.prompt: Select the statement that best describes the picture.
questions.explanationEn: Choice C is the statement that best describes people sitting around a table.
questions.explanationKo: C가 사람들이 테이블 주위에 앉아 있는 장면을 가장 잘 묘사합니다.
questions.koreanLearnerHint: 여러 사람이 테이블 주변에 있을 때는 한 사람의 작은 동작보다 전체 배치와 공통 상황을 먼저 보세요.

vocabularyItems.exampleSentence: Several people are sitting around a table.
vocabularyItems.meaningJa: テーブルを囲んで座る

vocabularyItems.exampleSentence: They may be having a meeting.

vocabularyItem.exampleSentence: Several people are sitting around a table.
vocabularyItem.meaningJa: テーブルを囲んで座る

questions.explanationJa: 正解は C です。この写真問題では、正しい文「The people are sitting around a table」が写真の中心動作・人物・物の状態を最も直接表しています。ほかの選択肢（The people are cooking food / The people are running outside）は、写真にない動作や物を含むため弱くなります。写真全体を訳そうとせず、まず主語、動作、場所の三点を音声と照合します。
questions.japaneseLearnerHint: 複数の人がテーブルの周りにいる時は、一人の細かい動作より全体の配置と共通の状況を見ます。

questions.transcript:
A. He is typing on a laptop
B. He is fixing a printer
C. He is talking to a colleague
D. He is opening a window
questions.prompt: Select the statement that best describes the picture.
questions.explanationEn: Choice A is the statement that best describes someone typing on a laptop.
questions.explanationKo: A가 노트북으로 타이핑하는 장면을 가장 잘 묘사합니다.
questions.koreanLearnerHint: 노트북을 사용하는 동작과 키보드, 화면을 함께 보세요. typing, laptop, keyboard 같은 단서가 정답 후보입니다.

vocabularyItems.exampleSentence: The person is typing on a laptop.
vocabularyItems.meaningJa: ノートパソコンで入力する

vocabularyItems.exampleSentence: The person's hands are near the keyboard.

vocabularyItem.exampleSentence: The person is typing on a laptop.
vocabularyItem.meaningJa: ノートパソコンで入力する

questions.explanationJa: 正解は A です。この写真問題では、正しい文「He is typing on a laptop」が写真の中心動作・人物・物の状態を最も直接表しています。ほかの選択肢（He is typing on a laptop / He is fixing a printer）は、写真にない動作や物を含むため弱くなります。写真全体を訳そうとせず、まず主語、動作、場所の三点を音声と照合します。
questions.japaneseLearnerHint: ノートパソコンを使う動作と、キーボードや画面を一緒に見ます。typing, laptop, keyboard が手がかりです。

questions.transcript:
A. The workers are shopping
B. The workers are swimming
C. The workers are sleeping
D. The workers are wearing helmets
questions.prompt: Select the statement that best describes the picture.
questions.explanationEn: Choice D is the statement that best matches the worker wearing a helmet.
questions.explanationKo: D가 헬멧을 쓴 작업자를 가장 잘 묘사합니다.
questions.koreanLearnerHint: 헬멧이나 작업복 같은 안전 장비는 직업과 장소를 알려 줍니다. 사람의 복장과 작업 환경을 함께 확인하세요.

vocabularyItems.exampleSentence: The worker is wearing a helmet.
The worker is standing at the site.

vocabularyItem.exampleSentence: The worker is wearing a helmet.

questions.explanationJa: 正解は D です。この写真問題では、正しい文「The workers are wearing helmets」が写真の中心動作・人物・物の状態を最も直接表しています。ほかの選択肢（The workers are shopping / The workers are swimming）は、写真にない動作や物を含むため弱くなります。写真全体を訳そうとせず、まず主語、動作、場所の三点を音声と照合します。
questions.japaneseLearnerHint: ヘルメットや作業着などの安全装備は、職業や場所を示します。服装と作業環境をセットで確認しましょう。

questions.transcript:
A. Chairs are stacked against the wall.
B. Employees are eating dinner.
C. A presentation is being delivered.
D. Computers are being repaired.
questions.prompt: Select the statement that best describes the picture.
options: A. Chairs are stacked against the wall.
C. A presentation is being delivered.
questions.explanationEn: Choice C is correct because it describes what is shown in the photo: C. A presentation is being delivered.
questions.koreanLearnerHint: 발표 장면에서는 앞에 선 사람, 화면이나 자료, 듣고 있는 사람들을 함께 보세요. 단순히 앉아 있는 장면으로만 판단하지 마세요.

vocabularyItems.exampleSentence: A presentation is being delivered.
A presentation is being delivered.

vocabularyItem.exampleSentence: A presentation is being delivered.

questions.explanationJa: 正解は C. A presentation is being delivered. です。この写真問題では、正しい文「A presentation is being delivered.」が写真の中心動作・人物・物の状態を最も直接表しています。ほかの選択肢（Chairs are stacked against the wall. / Employees are eating dinner.）は、写真にない動作や物を含むため弱くなります。写真全体を訳そうとせず、まず主語、動作、場所の三点を音声と照合します。
questions.japaneseLearnerHint: 発表の場面では、前に立つ人、画面や資料、聞いている人を合わせて見ます。単に座っている場面として判断しないでください。

questions.transcript:
A. The lights are being removed.
B. Papers are floating in the air.
C. Workers are carrying tables.
D. Office supplies are arranged on a desk.
questions.prompt: Select the statement that best describes the picture.
options: A. The lights are being removed.
B. Papers are floating in the air.
D. Office supplies are arranged on a desk.
questions.explanationEn: Choice D is correct because it describes what is shown in the photo: D. Office supplies are arranged on a desk.
questions.koreanLearnerHint: 사무용품 사진에서는 물건의 종류와 정리된 상태를 확인하세요. 사람이 사용 중인지, 물건만 놓여 있는지도 구분해야 합니다.

vocabularyItems.exampleSentence: Office supplies are arranged on a desk.
Office supplies are arranged on a desk.
Office supplies are arranged on a desk.

vocabularyItem.exampleSentence: Office supplies are arranged on a desk.

questions.explanationJa: 正解は D. Office supplies are arranged on a desk. です。この写真問題では、正しい文「Office supplies are arranged on a desk.」が写真の中心動作・人物・物の状態を最も直接表しています。ほかの選択肢（The lights are being removed. / Papers are floating in the air.）は、写真にない動作や物を含むため弱くなります。写真全体を訳そうとせず、まず主語、動作、場所の三点を音声と照合します。
questions.japaneseLearnerHint: 事務用品の写真では、物の種類と整理された状態を確認します。人が使っているのか、物だけが置かれているのかを区別します。

questions.transcript:
A. Dishes are stacked in boxes.
B. Food is being prepared in a kitchen.
C. Customers are paying the bill.
D. The restaurant is empty.
questions.prompt: Select the statement that best describes the picture.
options: A. Dishes are stacked in boxes.
B. Food is being prepared in a kitchen.
C. Customers are paying the bill.
questions.explanationEn: Choice B is correct because it describes what is shown in the photo: B. Food is being prepared in a kitchen.
questions.koreanLearnerHint: 음식 사진에서는 준비된 상태인지, 누군가 먹거나 서빙하는 중인지가 중요합니다. 동작이 없는 선택지는 상태 표현을 들어야 합니다.

vocabularyItems.exampleSentence: Food is being prepared in a kitchen.
Food is being prepared in a kitchen.
Food is being prepared in a kitchen.

vocabularyItem.exampleSentence: Food is being prepared in a kitchen.

questions.explanationJa: 正解は B. Food is being prepared in a kitchen. です。この写真問題では、正しい文「Food is being prepared in a kitchen.」が写真の中心動作・人物・物の状態を最も直接表しています。ほかの選択肢（Dishes are stacked in boxes. / Customers are paying the bill.）は、写真にない動作や物を含むため弱くなります。写真全体を訳そうとせず、まず主語、動作、場所の三点を音声と照合します。
questions.japaneseLearnerHint: 食べ物の写真では、準備された状態なのか、誰かが食べたり運んだりしている途中なのかを見ます。

questions.transcript:
A. People are working out indoors.
B. Equipment is being delivered.
C. The gym is closed for cleaning.
D. Customers are shopping for clothes.
questions.prompt: Select the statement that best describes the picture.
options: A. People are working out indoors.
C. The gym is closed for cleaning.
D. Customers are shopping for clothes.
questions.explanationEn: Choice A is correct because it describes what is shown in the photo: A. People are working out indoors.
questions.koreanLearnerHint: 운동 장면에서는 사람이 실내에서 운동하고 있는지, 장비를 사용하고 있는지 먼저 확인하세요.

vocabularyItems.exampleSentence: People are working out indoors.
People are working out indoors.

vocabularyItem.exampleSentence: People are working out indoors.

questions.explanationJa: 正解は A. People are working out indoors. です。この写真問題では、正しい文「People are working out indoors.」が写真の中心動作・人物・物の状態を最も直接表しています。ほかの選択肢（Equipment is being delivered. / The gym is closed for cleaning.）は、写真にない動作や物を含むため弱くなります。写真全体を訳そうとせず、まず主語、動作、場所の三点を音声と照合します。
questions.japaneseLearnerHint: 運動の場面では、人物が屋内で運動しているか、器具を使っているかを先に確認します。

questions.transcript:
A. Desks are being repaired.

questions.explanationEn: Choice C is correct because it describes what is shown in the photo: C. A teacher is writing on the board.
questions.koreanLearnerHint: 교실 장면에서는 선생님, 칠판, 글을 쓰는 동작 같은 단서를 연결해서 들으세요.

vocabularyItems.exampleSentence: A teacher is writing on the board.

A teacher is writing on the board.

vocabularyItem.exampleSentence: A teacher is writing on the board.

questions.japaneseLearnerHint: 教室の場面では、先生、黒板、書く動作などの手がかりをつなげて聞きます。

questions.transcript:
A. Workers are washing windows.
B. Employees are attending a concert.
C. The equipment is outdoors.
D. Machines are being operated in a factory.
questions.prompt: Select the statement that best describes the picture.
options: B. Employees are attending a concert.
D. Machines are being operated in a factory.
questions.explanationEn: Choice D is correct because it describes what is shown in the photo: D. Machines are being operated in a factory.
questions.koreanLearnerHint: 기계가 있는 사진에서는 사람이 조작하는지, 기계만 놓여 있는지 구분하세요. operated, machine, factory 같은 단서가 중요합니다.

vocabularyItems.exampleSentence: Machines are being operated in a factory.
Machines are being operated in a factory.
Machines are being operated in a factory.

vocabularyItem.exampleSentence: Machines are being operated in a factory.

questions.explanationJa: 正解は D. Machines are being operated in a factory. です。この写真問題では、正しい文「Machines are being operated in a factory.」が写真の中心動作・人物・物の状態を最も直接表しています。ほかの選択肢（Workers are washing windows. / Employees are attending a concert.）は、写真にない動作や物を含むため弱くなります。写真全体を訳そうとせず、まず主語、動作、場所の三点を音声と照合します。
questions.japaneseLearnerHint: 機械が写っている場合は、人が操作しているのか、機械だけが置かれているのかを区別します。operated, machine, factory が重要です。

questions.transcript:
A. Produce is being sold outdoors.

options: A. Produce is being sold outdoors.

vocabularyItems.exampleSentence: Produce is being sold outdoors.

questions.japaneseLearnerHint: 商品や農産物が見える時は、陳列、販売、準備された状態を先に確認します。人が持っているか置かれているかも手がかりです。

questions.japaneseLearnerHint: 会議の場面では、人々がテーブルの周りに座っているか、発表を聞いているか、書類を見ているかを全体で見ます。

questions.explanationJa: 正解は D. Boxes are being loaded. です。この写真問題では、正しい文「Boxes are being loaded.」が写真の中心動作・人物・物の状態を最も直接表しています。ほかの選択肢（The shelves are empty. / Products are displayed in windows.）は、写真にない動作や物を含むため弱くなります。写真全体を訳そうとせず、まず主語、動作、場所の三点を音声と照合します。
questions.japaneseLearnerHint: 箱の写真では、箱が積まれているのか、運ばれているのか、車に積まれているのか、状態と位置を区別します。
